item.title: Aperiodic neural activity reflects cortical excitability in humans
item.description: We show that the aperiodic exponent of neural power spectra tracks cortical excitation-inhibition balance across wake and sleep states using intracranial EEG recordings.

item.title: Theta oscillations coordinate hippocampal-prefrontal circuits during memory retrieval
item.description: Using high-density EEG and simultaneous fMRI, we demonstrate that 4-8 Hz theta oscillations synchronize hippocampal and prefrontal activity during episodic memory retrieval.

item.title: Spectral parameterization reveals age-related changes in neural dynamics
item.description: Applying spectral parameterization (specparam) to a large lifespan EEG dataset reveals systematic shifts in both periodic and aperiodic components across development and aging.
